preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stretchy_report WHERE report_name = 'LOC Expanded Data Report'

insert.column: WITH charge_fields AS ( SELECT mlc.loan_id, SUM(CASE WHEN mc.charge_time_enum = 1 THEN mlc.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_charges_at_disbursement, SUM(CASE WHEN mc.id = 2 THEN mlc.amount ELSE 0 END) AS early_payment_fee, SUM(CASE WHEN mc.id = 3 THEN mlc.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_late_payment_charges FROM m_loan_charge mlc LEFT JOIN m_charge mc ON mc.id = mlc.charge_id WHERE (mlc.is_active = TRUE AND mlc.waived = FALSE AND mc.charge_time_enum = 1) OR (mlc.is_active = TRUE AND mlc.waived = FALSE AND mc.id IN (2, 3)) GROUP BY mlc.loan_id ), repayment_schedule_cte AS ( SELECT loan_id, obligations_met_on_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY loan_id ORDER BY fromdate) AS rn FROM m_loan_repayment_schedule ) SELECT mc.display_name AS "SME Name", mlocab.name AS "Vendor Name", mloc.approved_credit_facility_amount AS "Facility Amount ", mllocp.loan_id AS "Loan ID", mllocp.invoice_no AS "Invoice No.", mllocp.invoice_date AS "Invoice Date", mllocp.invoice_currency AS "Invoice Currency", mllocp.invoice_amount AS "Invoice Amount", mllocp.amount_in_facility_currency AS "Amount in Facility Currency", mllocp.disapproved_amount AS "Disapproved Amount", mllocp.approved_receivable_amount AS "Approved Receivables Amount", mllocp.amount_after_advance AS "Amount after Advance %", mllocp.approved_payable_amount AS "Approved Payable Amount ", ml.disbursedon_date + ml.term_frequency AS "Loan Due Date", ml.disbursedon_date AS "Disbursement Date", ml.term_frequency AS "Expected Tenor (days)", CASE WHEN ml.loan_status_id = 100 THEN 'Awaiting approval' WHEN ml.loan_status_id = 200 THEN 'Approved' WHEN ml.loan_status_id = 300 THEN 'Active' WHEN ml.loan_status_id = 303 THEN 'Transfer in Progress' WHEN ml.loan_status_id = 304 THEN 'Transfer on Hold' WHEN ml.loan_status_id = 400 THEN 'Withdrawn by client' WHEN ml.loan_status_id = 500 THEN 'Rejected' WHEN ml.loan_status_id = 600 THEN 'Closed' WHEN ml.loan_status_id = 601 THEN 'Written-Off' WHEN ml.loan_status_id = 602 THEN 'Rescheduled' WHEN ml.loan_status_id = 700 THEN 'Overpaid' END AS "Status", ml.interest_charged_derived AS "Expected Interest", ml.net_disbursal_amount AS "Disbursement Amount", ml.principal_outstanding_derived AS "Principal Outstanding", ml.total_outstanding_derived AS "Net Outstanding", ml.annual_nominal_interest_rate AS "Interest %", current_date - mlaa.overdue_since_date_derived AS "Overdue Days", mlrs.obligations_met_on_date - ml.disbursedon_date AS "Utilized Tenor", mlrs.obligations_met_on_date AS "Repayment Date" FROM m_line_of_credit mloc LEFT JOIN m_client mc ON mloc.client_id = mc.id LEFT JOIN m_loan_line_of_credit_params mllocp ON mllocp.line_of_credit_id = mloc.id LEFT JOIN m_loan ml ON ml.id = mllocp.loan_id LEFT JOIN charge_fields cf ON cf.loan_id = ml.id LEFT JOIN m_loan_arrears_aging mlaa ON mlaa.loan_id = ml.id LEFT JOIN repayment_schedule_cte mlrs ON mlrs.loan_id = ml.id AND rn = 1 -- Only include buyer/supplier actually associated with the loan LEFT JOIN m_loan_approver_buyers_suppliers mlabs ON mlabs.loan_id = ml.id LEFT JOIN m_line_of_credit_approved_buyers mlocab ON mlocab.id = mlabs.buyer_supplier_id WHERE ml.id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mc.display_name, ml.id

column.name: description
column.value: Provides a comprehensive view of all Line of Credit (LOC) accounts, including loan, invoice, and repayment details.
